mapper.sql: select id, print_id, print_name, print_number, is_return, printfile_name, print_time, status_g, return_number, print_code, primary_path, present_path, return_time, print_room, gotothree from prints_log
mapper.insert:
insert into prints_log
print_id, print_name, print_number, is_return, printfile_name, print_time, status_g, return_number, print_code, primary_path, present_path, return_time, print_room, gotothree,
#{printId}, #{printName}, #{printNumber}, #{isReturn}, #{printfileName}, #{printTime}, #{statusG}, #{returnNumber}, #{printCode}, #{primaryPath}, #{presentPath}, #{returnTime}, #{printRoom}, #{gotothree},
mapper.delete:
delete from prints_log where id in
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT sum(print_number) as total, sum(return_number) as returnNumber, (SELECT sum(print_number) FROM prints_log WHERE is_return = 0 AND print_time BETWEEN '2022-08-22 00:00:00' AND '2022-08-28 23:59:59') as noReturnNumber, ((SELECT sum(print_number) FROM prints_log WHERE is_return = 1 AND print_time between #{times} and #{format2}) - sum(return_number)) weiReturnNumber FROM prints_log WHERE print_time between #{times} and #{format2}
SELECT count(0) FROM prints_log WHERE 1 = 1 and is_return = '0' and print_time between #{times} and #{format2}

SELECT sum(print_number) AS total, sum(return_number) AS returnNumber, (SELECT sum(print_number) FROM prints_log WHERE is_return = 0 AND print_time BETWEEN #{times} AND #{format2}) AS noReturnNumber, ((SELECT sum(print_number) FROM prints_log WHERE is_return = 1 AND print_time BETWEEN #{times} and #{format2}) - sum(return_number)) as weiReturnNumber FROM prints_log WHERE print_time BETWEEN #{times} and #{format2}

select id, print_id, print_name, print_number, is_return, printfile_name, print_time, status_g, return_number, print_code, primary_path, present_path,return_time,print_room,gotothree from prints_log
and printfile_name like concat('%',#{printfileName}, '%')
and return_time like concat('%',#{returnTime}, '%') and gotothree like concat('%',#{gotothree} , '%') and status_g = 0
order by return_time desc

select sum(print_number) print_number, sum(return_number) return_number from prints_log
is_return=1 and print_time like concat('%',#{printCode}, '%')
